recommendations.title: Salvatore Giuliano
recommendations.overview: Sicilian bandit Salvatore Giuliano's bullet-riddled corpse is found facedown in a courtyard in Castelvetrano, a handgun and rifle by his side. Local and international press descend upon the scene, hoping to crack open the true story behind the death

recommendations.title: Hands Over the City
recommendations.overview: Prior to a city council election, the collapse of a building leaves a land developer and his political backers defending themselves against a scandal.

recommendations.title: Many Wars Ago
recommendations.overview: Time after time, soldiers of the Italian Army are forced to leave their mountain trenches in attempts to storm an enemy fortress, always with the same disastrous results. As casualties mount, indignation spreads among the rank and file. Disturbed by

recommendations.title: Society of the Snow
recommendations.overview: On October 13, 1972, Uruguayan Air Force Flight 571, chartered to take a rugby team to Chile, crashes into a glacier in the heart of the Andes.

recommendations.title: Oppenheimer
recommendations.overview: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer's role in the development of the atomic bomb during World War II.

recommendations.title: The Wind Rises
recommendations.overview: A lifelong love of flight inspires Japanese aviation engineer Jiro Horikoshi, whose storied career includes the creation of the A-6M World War II fighter plane.

recommendations.title: Mark Felt: The Man Who Brought Down the White House
recommendations.overview: The story of Mark Felt, who under the name "Deep Throat" helped journalists Bob Woodward and Carl Bernstein uncover the Watergate scandal in 1974.

recommendations.title: Number 24
recommendations.overview: On the brink of the Second World War, a young Norwegian man's drive to resist the Nazis sets a new course for his future – and the future of his country.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man struggles to access sublimated childhood memories. He finds a technique that allows him to travel back into the past, to occupy his childhood body and change history. However, he soon finds that every change he makes has unexpected conseq

recommendations.title: The Electrical Life of Louis Wain
recommendations.overview: The extraordinary true story of eccentric British artist Louis Wain, whose playful, sometimes even psychedelic pictures helped to transform the public's perception of cats forever.
